rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors without changing unrelated architecture
generic_rules: Use only valid AGREE syntax and visible identifiers in repairs
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use type-level guarantees for visible ports and implementation-level assignments for valid outputs
Remove invalid guarantees or clauses instead of adding architecture
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-level references or subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not add architecture to fix AGREE syntax errors
irrelevant_topics: AGREE type scope range assumption and guarantee
